behavior_summary: This script implements spell-combat utilities for an NPC/actor that primarily launches fire- and demon-themed spell effects. It contains targeting/spawn helpers, per-projectile frame handlers, a randomized variant chooser, and a suspend-driven combat loop that repeatedly spawns and dispatches those effects.

U8P_SPELCMBT::func00A4 computes candidate spawn offsets around a target item/object, validates positions (canExistAt), spawns an effect actor when a valid spot is found, and issues a randomized combat bark — inferred to be the fire-spell targeting+spawn routine.
U8P_SPELCMBT::func04F7 manages per-projectile/per-frame behavior for active fire effects (calls FIRESPEL handlers when an item/frame condition is met and uses suspend points for timing).
U8P_SPELCMBT::func05D1 randomly selects among several effect variants (DAEMSPEL vs multiple FIRESPEL variants), sets parameters/flags, calls the chosen handler, and issues barks/spawns as needed.

U8P_SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop is the runtime loop: it maintains spawn retries, manages target acquisition and range checks, toggles avatar stasis briefly, and repeatedly invokes the chooser/handlers to produce sustained spell attacks.
notable_control_flow: Target acquisition and range gating in U8P_SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop: get current target -> if none attempt limited spawns -> if target dead search nearest enemy candidate -> choose behavior by distance and target type (close-range DAEMSPEL vs ranged FIRESPEL).

Spawn search in U8P_SPELCMBT::func00A4: iterate an 8-direction step pattern (local7 0..7) with expanding radius (local4) -> compute local2/local1/local0 coords -> call canExistAt -> on success spawn via FREE::func1C19 and invoke FIRESPEL handler, otherwise continue searching until failure.

Variant selection in U8P_SPELCMBT::func05D1: compute a cap from caster type -> draw random bucket (FREE::randomInRange0) -> branch into DAEMSPEL or one of multiple FIRESPEL variants, reset references (FREE::resetRef) and spawn visual actors with barks.

Per-projectile life-step in U8P_SPELCMBT::func04F7: maintain two boolean flags (local0, local1) and call FIRESPEL::func177A or FIRESPEL::func1CEB depending on presence of the referenced item and its animation frame, inserting suspend points for timing.
Loop/frame progression inside U8P_SPELCMBT::func04F7; treated as control-flow, not explicit internal call.
open_questions: U8P_SPELCMBT::func0080, U8P_SPELCMBT::func008C, U8P_SPELCMBT::func0098 and U8P_SPELCMBT::func0BD0 have no visible bodies in the excerpt — what precise roles do they play (dispatch, initialization, cleanup, or unused placeholders)?
Exact numeric spawn id(s) and masks passed to FREE::func1C19 / FREE::resetRef are inferred but not confirmed in the excerpt; what concrete spawn templates/entities are created?
Precise global flag names/semantics: the analysis infers avatarMasterSorcerer is written and MalchirTest is read — are these canonical global script flags and what downstream systems depend on them?
What are the exact parameter conventions for U8P_SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop (param1) and U8P_SPELCMBT::func05D1 (param2) in live usage (caller-provided selector index vs sentinel 0xFFFFFFFF)?
Edge cases for canExistAt: how often and under what map constraints will U8P_SPELCMBT::func00A4 fail to find a spawn location in practice (performance/timeout behavior)?
